description: Stable Diffusion / SDXL image generation and editing.

generate-sd3.notes: Image gen with randomness — no cache unless caller fixes seed. Requires multipart/form-data (not JSON); only usable via direct browser upload.

generate-xl.notes: Classic SDXL v1 endpoint — accepts JSON body { text_prompts: [{text,weight}], cfg_scale, width, height, samples, steps }. Returns { artifacts: [{base64, seed, finishReason}] }. 30 steps at 1024x1024 ≈ $0.012/image. Primary image-gen tool for the agent.
